programme.title: Live: United Football League
programme.desc: The Birmingham Stallions host the Orlando Storm for a UFL Week 4 match at Protective Stadium. This game is a pivotal clash between the undefeated expansion team and the multi-year champions. Orlando sits at the top of the standings with a 3-0 record.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Live: FOX 11 Sports Wrap
programme.desc: Full, uncut interviews with some of the big names in Sports.

programme.desc: TMZ TV tracks down today's hottest stars with their cameras, whether they are hitting the clubs or the dry cleaners.

programme.sub-title: Walmart Brawl; Cyclist Gets Hit By Car

programme.desc: Jordan and Pippen; Magic and Kareem; Curry and Thompson; Maris and Mantle.

programme.title: 99 to Beat
programme.desc: The remaining contestants compete in five games including Upturned Cups, Spring Head, Sleeping Bag Race, Traffic Cone Flip and Arc the Ball.

programme.title: FOX Local Futbol HQ
programme.desc: A look at the stories, rivalries and dreams driving nations towards soccer's ultimate prize, the FIFA World Cup trophy.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Bryce Adams shares with Graham Bensinger how she grew from running a sporting goods business to building a multi-million dollar OnlyFans empire with her ex, Brian; the two discuss how the venture went from fitness posts to adult content.

programme.title: Under Eye Bags? SOLUTION!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Coffee With America
programme.desc: Sasha Rionda serves up fresh inspiration for National Brunch Month with easy, delicious ideas to elevate your at-home gatherings; get an inside look at the latest cars, technology and trends from the New York International Auto Show; explore exciting travel highlights, including a new family-friendly cruise experience; simple spring home improvement suggestions; practical ways to upgrade your everyday lifestyle -- from better sleep to healthier relationships.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Jack Hibbs -- Real Life
programme.desc: It's my desire that through Jesus Christ, you will know real life!

programme.title: FOX News Sunday
programme.desc: Energy Secretary Chris Wright; Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.); Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.); former Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron; panel discussion with Francesca Chambers, Sarah Isgur, Reince Priebus and Kevin Walling.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR RaceDay
programme.desc: NASCAR fans get the very latest on the day's big race with this preview show featuring up-to-the-minute analysis, driver interviews, predictions and more. Host Shannon Spake is joined by analysts Chris Myers, Adam Alexander, Kaitlyn Vincie, and others.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series heads to Kansas Speedway for a 400-mile race. This marks the ninth event of the season. Drivers complete 267 laps around the 1.5-mile intermediate asphalt track. Ty Gibbs looks to build momentum following a win at Bristol.

programme.title: Live: IndyCar Racing
programme.desc: The IndyCar Series runs the Grand Prix of Long Beach in California. This event serves as the fifth round of the season. Drivers navigate 90 laps around a challenging 1.97-mile street circuit encircling the Long Beach Convention Center.

programme.title: Live: FOX 11 Sports Wrap
programme.desc: Full, uncut interviews with some of the big names in Sports.

programme.title: FOX 11 Weekend News
programme.desc: A stream of breaking news, events and stories taking place across the nation and the world.

programme.desc: Deliria can't get her family to sit still for just one nice picture.

programme.title: Sherri
programme.desc: Actress, comic and Emmy Award-winning longtime co-host of "The View" Sherri Shepherd appears before a live audience with a daily dose of pop culture, comedy, conversations and daytime talk staples, including celebrity and human-interest interviews.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Comic Lil Rel Howery and Jennifer chat about his Whats Funny Comedy Festival and upcoming film, "Animal Friends"; 5-year-old solar system expert Tyelan Frazier stops by; Grammy-winning artist Durand Bernarr comes by to chat about his album "Bloom.".

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A mother's death initially appears to be a suicide, but when investigators start to interview those closest to her, an evil plot emerges.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.sub-title: Fast Clues, Faster Pressure -- No Retakes
programme.desc: One clue sets the scene, then the clock gets loud. Do they deliver the perfect take -- or need a last-second save?

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.sub-title: They Almost Spotted It ... Then It Flew Away
programme.desc: A strong clue gets them close, but time keeps shrinking -- do they snag the word or miss it by seconds?

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.
